summary: List Recycled Action Plan Item Assignees
description: List of all Recycled Action Plan Item Assignees

parameters.name: filters[plan_item_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) associated with the specified Action Plan Item ID(s).

parameters.name: filters[created_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) created within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYYY-MM-...

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[plan_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) associated with the specified Action Plan ID(s)

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Direction (asc/desc) can be controlled by the presence or absence of '-' before the sort parameter.

plan_item_id.description: Plan Item ID of the Recycled Action Plan Item Assignee

created_at.description: Time the Recycled Action Plan Item Assignee was created

deleted_at.description: Time the Recycled Action Plan Item Assignee was deleted

is_holding.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the assignee is necessary to sign for a hold point

is_locked.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the assignee was added prior to an Action Plan's approval

first_name.description: First name of the Party Person

last_name.description: Last name of the Party Person

name.description: Full name of the Party Person

user_id.description: Login Information ID associated with the Party Person

is_employee.description: Indicates whether Party is an Employee of the current Company

login.description: Login Information associated with the Party Person

updated_at.description: Time the Party Person was updated

plan_id.description: Plan ID of the Action Plan Item Assignee

role.description: Role of the Recycled Action Plan Item Assignee

updated_at.description: Time the Recycled Action Plan Item Assignee was updated

active.description: Specifies if the Action Plan Verification Method is intended for use
